data.title: Add UI-artifact ## AI Blindspot Annotations to reviewer-delta-light.md; remove RED markers from .test-index
data.description: Insert ## AI Blindspot Annotations (UI artifacts only - SC1(e) sole check) before ## Overlay Classification in reviewer-delta-light.md. Run build-review-agents.sh. Run both test suites (test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh all 5 pass; test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh regression). Remove [test_blindspot_in_deep_hygiene] bracket annotation from deep-hygiene .test-index entry (5 entries remain). Commit delta + 10 agents + .test-index. SC1(e) content (UI artifacts only) requires human review per Rule 5. Depends on T5. testing_mode: UPDATE.
